default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding improvements, company growth, and address team concerns at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital experiencing rapid growth: 50% last month, potential for additional $1M+ with new contracts](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Onboarding process needs streamlining; Jess to create improved onboarding guide for new hire Jen](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Some team members unhappy with recent pod restructuring; focus on growth opportunities and client results](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Reddit account needs immediate attention; lack of published content since Nov 6 is concerning](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Challenges

  - [50% growth last month; three new contracts pending for another $1M+ growth](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Aiming to hire 3-4 managing editors monthly, creating 2 new pods per month](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Marcel juggling multiple responsibilities: fundraising prep, legal/accounting work, sales](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Transitioning to C-corp structure](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Planning to reach 100+ accounts by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

### Onboarding Improvements

  - [Current process lacks clear direction and purpose for some tasks](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Jess to create updated onboarding guide for new hire Jen (starting Jan 6)](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Implement "onboarding buddy" system for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on documenting, recording, and automating processes](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Ops Academy more helpful than Air Ops docs; need to update resources](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### Team Structure and Culture

  - [Some team members unhappy with pod restructuring decisions](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Pod lead selection based on strategy handling, client communication skills](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Emphasis on building a culture focused on client growth, not internal drama](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Need to balance keeping good talent while not pandering to title-focused complaints](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Encourage pod leads to motivate their teams and focus on client results](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Client Management and Growth Strategies

  - [Critical focus on growing client accounts and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Pod leads need to handle strategy and client expectations effectively](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Importance of clear communication and ability to explain/sell strategies to clients](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Reddit account requires immediate attention; no content published since November 6](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Need for aggressive content publishing and quick escalation of blockers](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Tech and Process Updates

  - [Plans to move away from Air Ops to a more focused platform for editors](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [New system will emphasize content quality management and editing within the platform](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Expect ongoing changes and "breaking" of processes every three months due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/eewSxszsGmdmZessrnZhUtDuwMvGZwku?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
